label: Genetics
description: General genetics terms (genotype, allele, phase, etc.) — usually invoked alongside a more specific domain

label: Relatedness
description: Pairwise relatedness / kinship — ngsRelate, KING, IBS/IBD, theta

label: Inheritance
description: Mendelian inheritance, pedigrees, trios, segregation, transmission distortion

label: Population genetics
description: FST, dxy, π, piN/piS, Tajima's D, neutrality, summary statistics

label: Structural variation
description: Inversions, translocations, breakpoints, dosage, SV calling

label: Population history
description: ROH, heterozygosity, GHSL, demographic inference, founder effects, ancient lineages

label: Annotation
description: Genes, TE copies, repeats, regulatory features, conserved blocks

label: Quality control
description: Coverage, missingness, contamination, sample QC, batch effects

label: Sample filtering
description: Exclude / include sample subsets by metadata, kinship, ancestry, phenotype

label: Ancestry
description: NGSadmix, pcangsd, Q matrices, local ancestry, admixture

label: Recombination
description: Recombination rate, pyrho, LD decay, fine-scale recombination maps

label: Phylogeny
description: Trees, divergence time, comparative across species
